title: Try the simplest approach
text: If alternating letters between two rows does not produce clear or continuous fragments, the original message may have been arranged over a longer repeating pattern that uses additional rails.

title: Try more rails
text: Try testing a longer cycle by placing letters across three rows in a downward and upward pattern. If this produces smoother sections than the two-row attempt, the ciphertext was likely arranged using more than two rows, following a wider zig-zag.
